core_mechanism: Exact solvability via a free-fermion (linearizing) representation at special commensurate parameter values, mapping an interacting/dissipative system onto a non-interacting one and thereby establishing an exact equivalence (duality) between two distinct models
brief_reason: The abstract constructs exact boundary states at the 'magic points' using a fermion representation and uses this to show the dissipative Hofstadter model is exactly equivalent to the critical boundary sine-Gordon model.
